name: Chocolate Truffle Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Oil the bottom of an 8 or 9-inch springform pan.
2. Melt the chocolate and butter (You can do this in a saucepan over low heat, though the original recipe suggests using a 200-degree oven).
3. Add flour, sugar, and hot water to the melted chocolate and butter mixture; blend well until smooth.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. In a separate bowl (preferably metal), beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture until fully incorporated.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 15 minutes in the middle of a 425-degree oven. For best results, extend this time to 25 minutes if using a 9-inch pan to ensure it is completely cooked.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
9. Sprinkle or sift powdered sugar over the top of the cooled cake.
